attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SAF_SALESREP_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SAF_INVOICE_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SALESREP_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.TERRITORY_ID, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SPLIT_PERCENT, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.CREATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.TRANSACTION_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS,
 (
 select SAF_SALESREP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS
 minus
 select SAF_SALESREP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SAF_SALESREP_ID = STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.SAF_SALESREP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_XXICM_SAF_SALESREPS_ALL)
